description: A VPP operator receives a request from the grid operator to curtail 5 MW of load in a specific zone for 2 hours.

nodes.task_description: Identify all enrolled commercial and industrial customers within the specified grid zone.

expected_outcome.value: Agent lists all eligible participants for the demand response event.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the total available load reduction from the identified customers based on their pre-committed levels.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms there is 7 MW of available load reduction capacity.

nodes.task_description: Send dispatch signals to the participating customers' building management systems to achieve the 5 MW target.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully sends the curtailment signals.

nodes.task_description: Monitor the real-time load reduction to ensure the 5 MW target is met and sustained for the 2-hour period.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides real-time updates on the event's performance.
